news.headline: BOTOX® Cosmetic approved by FDA for treating platysma bands, becoming first product to target four aesthetic indications.
news.summary: The sole product of its type authorized for use across four aesthetic purposes: temporarily enhancing the look of moderate to severe forehead lines, frown lines, crow's feet lines, and now platysma bands in adults1-5. Following this endorsement, BOTOX® Cosmetic emerges as the primary and exclusive solution.

Embraer's deliveries rose by 33% year-on-year, with 57 aircraft in 3Q24; backlog hit new record at US$ 22.7 billion.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, the company successfully delivered 57 aircraft compared to 43 in the same period last year. This included the delivery of 2 C-390 Millennium aircraft and fulfilling orders for 6-12 A-29 Super Tucanos. Additionally, the first E2 aircraft was delivered to LOT Polish Airlines during this quarter. The company's overall backlog stands at US$22.7 billion, reflecting a significant increase of over 25% year-on-year, marking the highest level in the past nine years.

news.headline: Nicholas Daniloff, aged 89, a veteran journalist during Cold War, was detained in Moscow on false espionage charges. He praised Reagan for aiding his release.
news.summary: An experienced foreign reporter who worked during the Cold War era was unjustly arrested on false espionage accusations. He acknowledged President Ronald Reagan for advocating for his liberation.

ThreeD Capital Inc. sells 10,750,000 common shares of Birchtree Investments Ltd., reducing ownership below 10%.
news.summary: On October 11, 2024, ThreeD Capital Inc. disclosed the sale of 10,750,000 common shares of Birchtree Investments Ltd., amounting to about 12.9% of the company's total common shares. This transaction caused ThreeD's ownership in Birchtree to drop below 10%, decreasing from 15.7% as per the previous report. ThreeD is a Canadian venture capital firm specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies. The company is listed on the CSE under the ticker IDK and on the OTCQX under the ticker IDKFF.

news.headline: Ecopetrol appoints Carlos Avila Saldarriaga as Vice President of Subsidiaries and Assets, effective Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: In Bogota, Colombia on October 18, 2024, Ecopetrol S.A. revealed a significant senior management change. Carlos Mauricio Avila Saldarriaga has been appointed as the Vice President of Subsidiaries and Assets, effective since October 16, 2024. Ecopetrol S.A. is listed on the Colombian Stock Exchange as ECOPETROL and on the New York Stock Exchange as EC.

news.headline: Celularity Inc. receives notice from Nasdaq for delisting due to late financial filings but plans to appeal. Common stock still trades under symbols "CELU" and "CELUW."
news.summary: In Florham Park, New Jersey, on October 18, 2024, Celularity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELU) announced that it has been notified by Nasdaq on October 16, 2024, about potential delisting due to delays in filing Forms 10-Q for the periods ending March 31, 2024, and June 30, 2024. The 180-day compliance period was not met. However, Celularity Inc.'s common stock and warrants, traded under "CELU" and "CELUW" respectively, remain listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market for now.

news.headline: Experian cancels $10 million in debt to support Hispanic financial freedom in the US. #DebtReliefInitiative
news.summary: Experian, based in Costa Mesa, California, has announced plans to alleviate $10 million in consumer debt, aiming to support Hispanics across the United States in achieving financial independence.

news.headline: Taiwan Semiconductor's stock soars 12% on strong earnings and growing demand, amid concerns over ASML and NVIDIA.
news.summary: Investors are optimistic about the technology sector in the US, especially as the services PMI index is driving economic growth, while the manufacturing sector continues to contract. The semiconductor and chipmaking industry, notably Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (NYSE: TSM), has been receiving much attention, with the company's stock soaring by 12% in a single day due to strong earnings and increased demand. However, concerns have been raised after NVIDIA Co. (NASDAQ: NVIDIA) announced an oversupply situation that could impact margins and EPS, leading to a sell-off. ASML Holding (NASDAQ: ASML) also experienced a stock drop of over 17% after missing booking guidance. This highlights the disparities within the technology sector and the potential risks associated with investing in specific companies within the industry.

news.headline: RV Trader honored as RV Women's Alliance Champion in Chicago. Recognized for empowering women in RV industry.

The company, based in Virginia Beach, has been praised for its efforts to promote inclusivity in the RV community. This recognition highlights their commitment to diversity and engagement with the industry.

Village Farms International notified by Nasdaq for not meeting $1 minimum bid price, Sept 6 - Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: Village Farms International, Inc. based in Vancouver, BC and Orlando, FL, disclosed on Oct. 18, 2024, that it has been notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC about its non-compliance with the minimum bid price rule. The bid price for the company's common shares fell below US $1.00, the Minimum Bid Requirement, from Sept. 6, 2024, to Oct. 17, 2024. Village Farms is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VFF.

Investors are closely monitoring the situation as they navigate the volatile market conditions.

news.headline: Three-year study shows 88% of EYLEA HD patients extend dosing intervals to ≥12 weeks, maintaining vision gains in Diabetic Macular Edema. #research #healthcare
news.summary: In a recent extension study of the Phase 3 PHOTON trial presented at AAO, it was found that 88% of patients using EYLEA HD were able to maintain a dosing interval of ≥12 weeks at week 156. These patients also sustained the visual and anatomic improvements that were initially achieved within the first 96 weeks of the trial.
